import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 使用已暂存的企业小时烟气量序列，不重新查询；本单元只创建本代理自有变量，不写入最终输出变量名

ts_col = next((c for c in ["timestamp", "time", "datetime", "date"] if c in flue_df.columns), None)
gas_col = next((c for c in ["exhaust_gas", "flue_gas", "flue_gas_volume"] if c in flue_df.columns), None)

if ts_col is None or gas_col is None:
    airpoll_hangang_hanbao_flue_gas_issue = {
        "status": "missing_required_columns",
        "available_columns": list(flue_df.columns),
        "timestamp_column_found": ts_col,
        "gas_column_found": gas_col
    }
    print("无法计算：已暂存烟气序列缺少必要的时间或烟气量字段。")
else:
    _df = flue_df[[ts_col, gas_col]].copy()
    _df[ts_col] = pd.to_datetime(_df[ts_col])
    _df[gas_col] = pd.to_numeric(_df[gas_col], errors="coerce")
    _df = _df[
        (_df[ts_col] >= hangang_hanbao_window_start) &
        (_df[ts_col] < hangang_hanbao_window_end_exclusive) &
        (_df[gas_col].notna())
    ].sort_values(ts_col)

    if _df.empty:
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_flue_gas_issue = {
            "status": "no_valid_rows_in_staged_series",
            "company_id": company_id_hangang_hanbao,
            "window_start": hangang_hanbao_window_start,
            "window_end_exclusive": hangang_hanbao_window_end_exclusive
        }
        print("无法计算：指定窗口内已暂存烟气序列无有效读数。")
    else:
        _peak_idx = _df[gas_col].idxmax()
        _peak_ts = _df.loc[_peak_idx, ts_col]
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_peak_flue_gas_for_synthesis = float(_df.loc[_peak_idx, gas_col])
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_mean_flue_gas_for_synthesis = float(_df[gas_col].mean())
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_std_flue_gas_for_synthesis = float(_df[gas_col].std(ddof=0))
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_peak_flue_gas_offset_hours_for_synthesis = int((_peak_ts - hangang_hanbao_window_start).total_seconds() // 3600)

        # 高排放时段：以“均值 + 1个总体标准差”为统计阈值，合并连续小时
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_threshold = float(
            airpoll_hangang_hanbao_mean_flue_gas_for_synthesis + airpoll_hangang_hanbao_std_flue_gas_for_synthesis
        )
        _high = _df[_df[gas_col] >= airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_threshold].copy()

        _periods = []
        if not _high.empty:
            _grp = (_high[ts_col].diff() != pd.Timedelta(hours=1)).cumsum()
            for _, g in _high.groupby(_grp):
                _periods.append({
                    "start": g[ts_col].iloc[0],
                    "end_inclusive": g[ts_col].iloc[-1],
                    "duration_hours": int(len(g)),
                    "max_flue_gas": float(g[gas_col].max()),
                    "mean_flue_gas": float(g[gas_col].mean())
                })

        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_periods_for_synthesis = pd.DataFrame(_periods)
        airpoll_hangang_hanbao_flue_gas_stats_for_synthesis = {
            "valid_hour_count": int(len(_df)),
            "expected_hour_count": int((hangang_hanbao_window_end_exclusive - hangang_hanbao_window_start).total_seconds() // 3600),
            "peak_flue_gas": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_peak_flue_gas_for_synthesis,
            "peak_timestamp": _peak_ts,
            "peak_flue_gas_offset_hours": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_peak_flue_gas_offset_hours_for_synthesis,
            "mean_flue_gas": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_mean_flue_gas_for_synthesis,
            "std_flue_gas_population": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_std_flue_gas_for_synthesis,
            "high_emission_threshold_mean_plus_1std": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_threshold,
            "high_emission_hour_count": int(len(_high)),
            "high_emission_period_count": int(len(_periods))
        }

        print("河钢集团邯宝钢铁有限公司2025-06-10至2025-06-12烟气量统计已完成。")
        print({
            "有效小时数": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_flue_gas_stats_for_synthesis["valid_hour_count"],
            "应有小时数": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_flue_gas_stats_for_synthesis["expected_hour_count"],
            "峰值烟气量": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_peak_flue_gas_for_synthesis,
            "峰值发生时间": str(_peak_ts),
            "峰值相对起点小时偏移": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_peak_flue_gas_offset_hours_for_synthesis,
            "平均烟气量": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_mean_flue_gas_for_synthesis,
            "总体标准差": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_std_flue_gas_for_synthesis,
            "高排放阈值": airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_threshold,
            "高排放小时数": int(len(_high)),
            "高排放连续时段数": int(len(_periods))
        })
        if _periods:
            print("高排放时段汇总：")
            print(airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_periods_for_synthesis.to_string(index=False))
        else:
            print("未识别到达到高排放阈值的小时。")

import pandas as pd, numpy as np

# 使用已暂存的企业排放高值时段与同步气象数据；不重算、不覆盖最终输出变量
weather_df = hangang_hanbao_concurrent_district_weather_df.copy()
weather_source = "district"
if weather_df.empty:
    weather_df = hangang_hanbao_concurrent_city_weather_df.copy()
    weather_source = "city"

flue_ts = flue_df[[ts_col, gas_col]].copy()
flue_ts[ts_col] = pd.to_datetime(flue_ts[ts_col])
flue_ts = flue_ts.sort_values(ts_col)

# 将既有“高排放时段”结果转换为逐小时标记；若时段表结构不可直接识别，则退回使用已暂存阈值进行一致性标记
hp = airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_periods_for_synthesis.copy()
high_mask = pd.Series(False, index=flue_ts.index)
used_high_period_source = "identified_periods"
if not hp.empty:
    hp_cols = {c.lower(): c for c in hp.columns}
    start_candidates = [hp_cols[c] for c in hp_cols if ("start" in c) or ("begin" in c)]
    end_candidates = [hp_cols[c] for c in hp_cols if ("end" in c) or ("finish" in c)]
    if start_candidates and end_candidates:
        sc, ec = start_candidates[0], end_candidates[0]
        for _, r in hp.iterrows():
            s, e = pd.to_datetime(r[sc]), pd.to_datetime(r[ec])
            high_mask |= ((flue_ts[ts_col] >= s) & (flue_ts[ts_col] <= e))
    else:
        used_high_period_source = "staged_threshold"
        high_mask = flue_ts[gas_col] >= airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_threshold
else:
    used_high_period_source = "staged_threshold"
    high_mask = flue_ts[gas_col] >= airpoll_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_threshold

flue_ts["is_high_emission_period"] = high_mask.astype(bool)

if weather_df.empty:
    met_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_weather_assessment_for_synthesis = {
        "status": "no_concurrent_weather_data",
        "weather_source": weather_source,
        "message": "同步气象数据为空，无法判断高排放时段是否伴随不利气象条件。"
    }
    print("同步气象数据为空：无法开展高排放时段与不利气象条件重合评估。")
else:
    # 标准化时间列并仅取必要气象变量
    w = weather_df.copy()
    time_col = "timestamp" if "timestamp" in w.columns else [c for c in w.columns if "time" in c.lower()][0]
    w[time_col] = pd.to_datetime(w[time_col])
    keep_cols = [time_col] + [c for c in ["wind_speed", "wind_scale", "humidity", "temperature", "wind_degree", "wind_direction"] if c in w.columns]
    w = w[keep_cols].drop_duplicates(subset=[time_col]).sort_values(time_col)

    joined = flue_ts.merge(w, left_on=ts_col, right_on=time_col, how="left")
    joined["has_weather"] = joined[[c for c in ["wind_speed","wind_scale","humidity"] if c in joined.columns]].notna().any(axis=1)

    # 定义不利扩散气象：低风速/弱风级；高湿作为污染累积和颗粒物增长的不利辅助条件
    valid_weather = joined[joined["has_weather"]].copy()
    ws_q25 = float(valid_weather["wind_speed"].quantile(0.25)) if "wind_speed" in valid_weather.columns and valid_weather["wind_speed"].notna().any() else np.nan
    hum_q75 = float(valid_weather["humidity"].quantile(0.75)) if "humidity" in valid_weather.columns and valid_weather["humidity"].notna().any() else np.nan

    low_wind = pd.Series(False, index=joined.index)
    if "wind_speed" in joined.columns and not np.isnan(ws_q25):
        low_wind |= joined["wind_speed"].le(ws_q25)
    if "wind_scale" in joined.columns:
        low_wind |= joined["wind_scale"].le(1)

    high_humidity = pd.Series(False, index=joined.index)
    if "humidity" in joined.columns and not np.isnan(hum_q75):
        high_humidity |= joined["humidity"].ge(max(75.0, hum_q75))

    joined["adverse_weather"] = (low_wind | high_humidity) & joined["has_weather"]
    joined["low_wind_condition"] = low_wind & joined["has_weather"]
    joined["high_humidity_condition"] = high_humidity & joined["has_weather"]

    def grp_stats(df):
        out = {
            "hours": int(len(df)),
            "weather_hours": int(df["has_weather"].sum()),
            "adverse_hours": int(df["adverse_weather"].sum()),
            "adverse_fraction": float(df["adverse_weather"].mean()) if len(df) else np.nan,
            "low_wind_fraction": float(df["low_wind_condition"].mean()) if len(df) else np.nan,
            "high_humidity_fraction": float(df["high_humidity_condition"].mean()) if len(df) else np.nan,
            "mean_flue_gas": float(df[gas_col].mean()) if len(df) else np.nan
        }
        for c in ["wind_speed", "wind_scale", "humidity", "temperature"]:
            if c in df.columns and df[c].notna().any():
                out[f"mean_{c}"] = float(df[c].mean())
                out[f"median_{c}"] = float(df[c].median())
        return out

    high_df = joined[joined["is_high_emission_period"] & joined["has_weather"]].copy()
    nonhigh_df = joined[(~joined["is_high_emission_period"]) & joined["has_weather"]].copy()

    high_stats = grp_stats(high_df)
    nonhigh_stats = grp_stats(nonhigh_df)

    # 小样本保护下的差异量
    adverse_rate_diff = high_stats["adverse_fraction"] - nonhigh_stats["adverse_fraction"] if high_stats["hours"] and nonhigh_stats["hours"] else np.nan
    mean_ws_diff = (high_stats.get("mean_wind_speed", np.nan) - nonhigh_stats.get("mean_wind_speed", np.nan)) if high_stats["hours"] and nonhigh_stats["hours"] else np.nan
    mean_hum_diff = (high_stats.get("mean_humidity", np.nan) - nonhigh_stats.get("mean_humidity", np.nan)) if high_stats["hours"] and nonhigh_stats["hours"] else np.nan

    # 逐时重合清单只存储不打印
    met_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_weather_overlap_hours_for_synthesis = joined.loc[
        joined["is_high_emission_period"] & joined["has_weather"],
        [c for c in [ts_col, gas_col, "adverse_weather", "low_wind_condition", "high_humidity_condition", "wind_speed", "wind_scale", "humidity", "temperature", "wind_degree", "wind_direction"] if c in joined.columns]
    ].copy()

    met_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_weather_assessment_for_synthesis = {
        "status": "ok",
        "weather_source": weather_source,
        "high_period_source": used_high_period_source,
        "total_emission_hours": int(len(joined)),
        "hours_with_weather": int(joined["has_weather"].sum()),
        "high_emission_hours_with_weather": int(len(high_df)),
        "nonhigh_hours_with_weather": int(len(nonhigh_df)),
        "adverse_definition": {
            "low_wind": f"wind_speed <= within-window 25th percentile ({ws_q25:.3f}) or wind_scale <= 1" if not np.isnan(ws_q25) else "wind_scale <= 1 where available",
            "high_humidity": f"humidity >= max(75%, within-window 75th percentile {hum_q75:.3f})" if not np.isnan(hum_q75) else "humidity data unavailable",
            "adverse_weather": "low_wind OR high_humidity"
        },
        "high_emission_weather_stats": high_stats,
        "nonhigh_weather_stats": nonhigh_stats,
        "differences_high_minus_nonhigh": {
            "adverse_fraction": float(adverse_rate_diff) if not np.isnan(adverse_rate_diff) else np.nan,
            "mean_wind_speed": float(mean_ws_diff) if not np.isnan(mean_ws_diff) else np.nan,
            "mean_humidity": float(mean_hum_diff) if not np.isnan(mean_hum_diff) else np.nan
        }
    }

    print("高排放-同步气象重合评估汇总")
    print({
        "weather_source": weather_source,
        "high_period_source": used_high_period_source,
        "total_hours": int(len(joined)),
        "hours_with_weather": int(joined["has_weather"].sum()),
        "high_emission_hours_with_weather": int(len(high_df)),
        "nonhigh_hours_with_weather": int(len(nonhigh_df)),
        "low_wind_threshold_wind_speed": None if np.isnan(ws_q25) else round(ws_q25, 3),
        "high_humidity_threshold": None if np.isnan(hum_q75) else round(max(75.0, hum_q75), 3),
        "high_adverse_fraction": None if np.isnan(high_stats["adverse_fraction"]) else round(high_stats["adverse_fraction"], 3),
        "nonhigh_adverse_fraction": None if np.isnan(nonhigh_stats["adverse_fraction"]) else round(nonhigh_stats["adverse_fraction"], 3),
        "adverse_fraction_difference": None if np.isnan(adverse_rate_diff) else round(adverse_rate_diff, 3),
        "mean_wind_speed_high": None if np.isnan(high_stats.get("mean_wind_speed", np.nan)) else round(high_stats["mean_wind_speed"], 3),
        "mean_wind_speed_nonhigh": None if np.isnan(nonhigh_stats.get("mean_wind_speed", np.nan)) else round(nonhigh_stats["mean_wind_speed"], 3),
        "mean_humidity_high": None if np.isnan(high_stats.get("mean_humidity", np.nan)) else round(high_stats["mean_humidity"], 3),
        "mean_humidity_nonhigh": None if np.isnan(nonhigh_stats.get("mean_humidity", np.nan)) else round(nonhigh_stats["mean_humidity"], 3)
    })

# 复核风速异常值：负风速不具物理意义，需评估其对“不利气象”判定的影响，并另存清洗后结果
j = met_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_weather_overlap_hours_for_synthesis.copy()
# 需要完整 joined 数据；若仍在会话中可直接使用
jw = joined.copy()

wind_quality_summary = {}
if "wind_speed" in jw.columns:
    wind_quality_summary = {
        "wind_speed_count": int(jw["wind_speed"].notna().sum()),
        "negative_wind_speed_count": int((jw["wind_speed"] < 0).sum()),
        "zero_wind_speed_count": int((jw["wind_speed"] == 0).sum()),
        "min_wind_speed": float(jw["wind_speed"].min()),
        "max_wind_speed": float(jw["wind_speed"].max()),
        "negative_wind_speed_high_hours": int(((jw["wind_speed"] < 0) & jw["is_high_emission_period"]).sum()),
        "negative_wind_speed_nonhigh_hours": int(((jw["wind_speed"] < 0) & (~jw["is_high_emission_period"])).sum())
    }

jw_clean = jw.copy()
if "wind_speed" in jw_clean.columns:
    jw_clean.loc[jw_clean["wind_speed"] < 0, "wind_speed_clean"] = np.nan
    jw_clean.loc[jw_clean["wind_speed"] >= 0, "wind_speed_clean"] = jw_clean.loc[jw_clean["wind_speed"] >= 0, "wind_speed"]

clean_valid = jw_clean[jw_clean["has_weather"]].copy()
clean_ws_q25 = float(clean_valid["wind_speed_clean"].quantile(0.25)) if "wind_speed_clean" in clean_valid.columns and clean_valid["wind_speed_clean"].notna().any() else np.nan
clean_hum_q75 = float(clean_valid["humidity"].quantile(0.75)) if "humidity" in clean_valid.columns and clean_valid["humidity"].notna().any() else np.nan

clean_low_wind = pd.Series(False, index=jw_clean.index)
if "wind_speed_clean" in jw_clean.columns and not np.isnan(clean_ws_q25):
    clean_low_wind |= jw_clean["wind_speed_clean"].le(clean_ws_q25)
if "wind_scale" in jw_clean.columns:
    clean_low_wind |= jw_clean["wind_scale"].le(1)

clean_high_humidity = pd.Series(False, index=jw_clean.index)
if "humidity" in jw_clean.columns and not np.isnan(clean_hum_q75):
    clean_high_humidity |= jw_clean["humidity"].ge(max(75.0, clean_hum_q75))

jw_clean["adverse_weather_clean"] = (clean_low_wind | clean_high_humidity) & jw_clean["has_weather"]
jw_clean["low_wind_condition_clean"] = clean_low_wind & jw_clean["has_weather"]
jw_clean["high_humidity_condition_clean"] = clean_high_humidity & jw_clean["has_weather"]

def clean_grp_stats(df):
    out = {
        "hours": int(len(df)),

clean_high_stats = clean_grp_stats(clean_high_df)
clean_nonhigh_stats = clean_grp_stats(clean_nonhigh_df)

met_hangang_hanbao_wind_quality_check_for_synthesis = wind_quality_summary
met_hangang_hanbao_high_emission_weather_assessment_clean_for_synthesis = {
    "status": "ok_with_negative_wind_speed_excluded",
    "weather_source": weather_source,
    "wind_quality_summary": wind_quality_summary,

    }
}

overlap = j_city[j_city["correlated_hour"]].copy()
periods = []
if not overlap.empty:
    overlap["grp"] = (overlap["timestamp"].diff().dt.total_seconds().fillna(3600) != 3600).cumsum()
    for _, g in overlap.groupby("grp"):
        periods.append({
            "开始": str(g["timestamp"].min()),
            "结束": str(g["timestamp"].max() + pd.Timedelta(hours=1)),
            "持续小时": int(len(g)),
            "最大小时烟气量": float(g["exhaust_gas"].max()),
            "平均小时烟气量": float(g["exhaust_gas"].mean()),
            "平均风速": float(g["wind_speed"].mean()),
            "平均湿度": float(g["humidity"].mean()),
            "主要风向": g["wind_direction"].mode().iloc[0] if g["wind_direction"].notna().any() else None,
            "低风速小时数": int(g["low_wind"].sum()),
            "高湿度小时数": int(g["high_humidity"].sum())
        })
periods_df = pd.DataFrame(periods)
print("高排放且不利气象连续时段数量:", len(periods_df))
print("高排放且不利气象连续时段摘要:", periods_df.to_dict("records") if len(periods_df) else [])
